inputs.label: Initial Quantity
inputs.businessContext: Initial mass of the radioactive substance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Initial mass of the radioactive substance.

inputs.label: Half-Life
inputs.businessContext: Time required for half of the substance to decay.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required for half of the substance to decay.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maddenin yarısının bozunması için gereken süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, die benötigt wird, damit die Hälfte des Stoffes zerfällt

inputs.label: Elapsed Time
inputs.businessContext: Time duration over which decay is calculated.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time duration over which decay is calculated.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeitraum, über den der Zerfall berechnet wird

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for safety margin in criticality or radiological assessments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for safety margin in criticality or radiological assessments.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kritiklik veya radyolojik değerlendirmelerde güvenlik marjı çarpanı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für Sicherheitsmarge bei Kritikalitäts- oder Strahlenschutzbewertungen

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
